message:
test(mux-pool): add batch render pipeline depth=1 test with asupersync Cx

Add pool_batch_render_pipeline_depth_one_with_cx test exercising the
get_pane_render_changes_batch_with_cx path with pipeline_depth=1,
verifying sequential batch processing returns correct pane IDs when
using the asupersync runtime context.
